text:
Market today: The market has a mixed feel, but your tech and chip names are seeing specific news. The major driver is the significant SK Hynix offering, impacting the chip sector, alongside positive signals from the Fed's embrace of AI for tech.

Your holdings: SOXL is a major concern, down -24.38% and leveraged. SPAL, a new leveraged ETF in your book, is already down -20.64% and moves fast. Remember, margin amplifies these drops.

Watch: Keep an eye on the broader chip sector's reaction to the SK Hynix offering. Also, watch for continued strength in tech, especially names with AI exposure, following the Fed's comments.

Bottom line: Prioritize managing your leveraged positions and stay vigilant on chip sector sentiment.
plays: SOXL: Respect your stop at 200.00. Given the -24.38% drawdown and leverage, this is critical.
SPAL: Your new leveraged ETF position is down -20.64%. Consider tightening your stop from 21.38 to protect capital, given its volatility.
No new buys today - hold and watch.
